raw:
I'll do real recon on the changed files to judge whether the work fulfills the task intent.
The relevant files are modified but uncommitted. Let me read the diffs.
reader.ts looks thorough. Let me verify the supporting types exist and check index.ts + view.ts.
Let me check the rest of index.ts changes and view.ts.
Let me verify DIRECT_STATUS_KEY is untouched and check spinner interval + STATUS_KEY usage.
DIRECT_STATUS_KEY untouched (still uses setStatus, correct). Now view.ts.
All four deliverables in view.ts: owner badge in picker rows, header with N yours, mine-only filter (m key), root header owner badge, agent live summary. Now the test file.
Comprehensive, real assertions. Let me run the verify command to confirm green.
Let me verify reader.ts purity (no pi/TUI imports) and SPINNER existence.
All deliverables verified against the actual code:

**Deliverable 1 (Statusline → panel):**
- reader.ts:340-503 enriches model with `liveAction`/`toolCount`/`ctxTokens`/`elapsedMs`, pure & defensive (try/catch, omits fields when transcript absent, injected `now`).
- reader.ts:660-720 `formatStatusPanel` renders `─ FOREMAN …` title with right-aligned "N active · M done" summary, done collapsed to count, attention ordering (running→gate→escalated), spinner+badge+elapsed, `↳ … tools … ctx` sub-line, `needs you: ship?`/`stuck`, `+K more`, ≤7 lines, injected color/frame.
- index.ts:1082-1095 replaces `setStatus` with `setWidget(STATUS_KEY, …, {placement:"aboveEditor"})`, clears with `undefined` when no non-done tasks, no-UI guard via `typeof setWidget`, now floored to second granularity. DIRECT_STATUS_KEY untouched (index.ts:967).

**Deliverable 2 (Dashboard session ownership):**
- sessionId threaded via ctrl+b/ctrl+f (index.ts:982,997) into ForemanDashboard.
- view.ts owner badges in picker rows + root header, header shows "N yours", `m` mine-only filter, agent view live summary reusing reader enrichment.
- `sortForPicker` exported pure + unit-tested.

**Tests:** reader_test.sh extended with all required assertions (enriched fields derived/omitted, panel title+collapsed done+spinner+sub-line+gate, session exclusion, sortForPicker ordering). All four verify suites pass green. reader.ts stays node-builtin-only (pure).

No cheats: tests exercise real seeded transcripts/states, no hardcoding. Blast radius confined to the four allowed files.

VERDICT: PASS
